events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被要求评估一个场景：在制造或组装车间，电气工作，设备接地的范围。现场观察到的条件是：CSST（Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing，波纹不锈钢管）燃气管线未接地。工作阶段是rough-complete（已安装或组装，但尚未最终完成）。参考材料：NEC 250.104和250.30。

我们需要输出JSON到/app/answer.json，包含决策（通过/失败/需要更多信息）、风险等级、工作阶段、组件条件、完成百分比、价值、声音来源、置信度、事件时间、速率、订单、可工作项、发现项、行动、理由、参考文献。

分析：CSST燃气管线未接地。根据NEC 250.104(B)：“其他金属管道：在可能带电的情况下，应该连接到一个接地电极系统、接地电极导体、或接地母线上。” 实际上，NEC要求对可能带电的金属管道进行接地。CSST燃气管线通常是需要接地的，特别是因为闪电等可能导致电荷积聚。如果未接地，这是一个不合规的情况，可能存在安全隐患。工作阶段是rough-complete，意味着安装已完成但没有最终检查。未接地属于缺陷，需要纠正。组件条件：“installed-defective”可能适用（已安装但有缺陷）。

决策：由于未接地，可能不符合规范，应该判为fail（失败）。风险：电气危险，可能为中等或高。CSST未接地可能导致火灾或爆炸风险，如果附近有闪电，所以风险可能是高或关键。这里选high。工作阶段已经是rough-complete。组件条件：["installed-defective", "non-compliant"]。完成百分比：估计已经完成安装，但存在缺陷，可能需要返工，所以或许80%？但根据提示“percent_complete是您对整体进度的数值估计”，因为还没有最终完成，可能90%？或者由于缺陷，实际有效的完成度较低。我将估计为90%表示安装大体完成。value不需要。sound_source不需要。confidence：我对这个判断的置信度，比如0.9。event_time, rate, order, workable不需要，设为null或空列表。findings：描述发现的缺陷："CSST gas line not bonded as required by NEC 250.104(B)"。actions："Bond the CSST gas line to the electrical grounding system"。
rationale："CSST gas piping must be bonded to reduce risk of arcing from lightning or electrical faults. Per NEC 250.104(B), metal piping likely to become energized must be bonded. This is a safety hazard."
references: ["NEC 250.104(B)"] 也提到250.30? 250.30是关于独立系统的接地，可能不太相关。所以主要引用250.104(B)。

JSON结构：decision: "fail", risk: "high", work_stage: "rough-complete", component_conditions: ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"], percent_complete: 90, value: 0, sound_source: "", confidence: 0.95, event_time: 0, rate: 0, order: [], workable: [], findings: ["CSST gas line is not bonded"], actions: ["Bond the CSST gas line per NEC 250.104(B)"], rationale: "Unbonded CSST gas line poses a risk of electrical arcing and fire. NEC 250.104(B) requires bonding of metal piping likely to become energized.", references: ["NEC 250.104(B)"]}

注意：输出必须只是JSON，所以直接写这个对象。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 90,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": ["CSST gas line is not bonded"],
  "actions": ["Bond the CSST gas line to the electrical grounding electrode system in accordance with NEC 250.104(B)"],
  "rationale": "Unbonded CSST gas piping is a known fire and shock hazard, especially from lightning-induced arcing. NEC 250.104(B) requires bonding of metal piping likely to become energized, and CSST is explicitly included in this requirement.",
  "references": ["NEC 250.104(B)", "NEC 250.30"]
}
